auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Bookingmood API key used as an Authorization Bearer token. Create or view it from your Bookingmood account API settings: https://www.bookingmood.com/en-US/api-reference.

actions.name: list_bookings
actions.description: List Bookingmood bookings with optional PostgREST select, pagination, ordering, and ID filters.

select.description: Columns to select from the bookings endpoint.

limit.description: Maximum number of bookings to return.

offset.description: Number of bookings to skip before returning results.

order.description: PostgREST order expression for bookings, such as created_at.desc or updated_at.asc.

id.description: PostgREST filter for a specific booking ID.

organization_id.description: PostgREST filter for a specific organization ID.

product_id.description: PostgREST filter for bookings related to a product ID.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Bookingmood bookings.

organization_id.description: The organization identifier that owns the booking.

product_id.description: The product identifier associated with the booking.

status.description: The booking status returned by Bookingmood.

start_at.description: The booking start timestamp returned by Bookingmood.

end_at.description: The booking end timestamp returned by Bookingmood.

created_at.description: The booking creation timestamp returned by Bookingmood.

updated_at.description: The booking update timestamp returned by Bookingmood.

outputSchema.description: Bookingmood bookings returned by the API.

actions.name: list_products
actions.description: List Bookingmood products with optional PostgREST select, pagination, ordering, and ID filters.

select.description: Columns to select from the products endpoint.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return.

offset.description: Number of products to skip before returning results.

order.description: PostgREST order expression for products, such as created_at.desc or updated_at.asc.

id.description: PostgREST filter for a specific product ID.

organization_id.description: PostgREST filter for a specific organization ID.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Bookingmood products.

organization_id.description: The organization identifier that owns the product.

name.description: The localized product name returned by Bookingmood.

created_at.description: The product creation timestamp returned by Bookingmood.

updated_at.description: The product update timestamp returned by Bookingmood.

outputSchema.description: Bookingmood products returned by the API.

actions.name: query_availability
actions.description: Fetch Bookingmood availability for a product using the official availability endpoint.

product_id.description: Bookingmood product ID to query availability for.

start.description: Start date for the availability window.

end.description: End date for the availability window.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for fetching Bookingmood availability for one product.

date.description: The date or interval key returned by Bookingmood.

available.description: Whether the product is available for the interval.

raw.description: Raw availability payload returned by Bookingmood.

outputSchema.description: Bookingmood availability returned for the requested product.
